description: Add manual refresh keybinding to TUI to reload project and worktree data. Currently, the TUI loads worktrees once at startup via loadWorktrees() and auto-reloads after create/delete operations, but users cannot manually trigger a refresh to see external changes (e.g., worktrees created outside the TUI, status updates from git operations). The desired outcome is a keybinding (suggest 'r' for refresh or 'ctrl+r') that reloads all projects' worktrees and their git status, with the refresh action documented in the help text at the bottom of the TUI.
acceptance_criteria: Pressing the refresh key (e.g., 'r') triggers a reload of all worktrees and their status information
The help text at the bottom displays the refresh keybinding (e.g., '[r] refresh')
After refreshing, the TUI displays updated worktree lists and status indicators (*, ↑, ↓)
The selected item remains selected (or closest valid item) after refresh

verification.value: Run 'go run .' in the wt directory, press the refresh key, verify worktree list updates without errors and help text shows the keybinding
